summary: Tested product sorting feature for Medical Equipment and Personal Care pages. Backend API tests (8/8 passed) verify products have required sorting fields (name, selling_price, discount_percent). Frontend code review confirms correct sorting implementation with 4 options (A-Z default, Price Low-High, Price High-Low, Discount highest first).

findings: ✅ Line 30: Default sort state is 'name_asc' (alphabetical A-Z)
✅ Lines 113-125: useMemo correctly sorts by price_asc, price_desc, discount (highest first), name_asc
✅ Lines 218-242: Sort bar UI with 4 pill buttons using correct data-testid attributes
✅ Line 233: Active sort pill uses bg-orange-500 (orange accent)
✅ Sort works with subcategory filter and search (line 126 dependencies)
✅ ArrowDownUp icon from lucide-react indicates sorting
✅ Line 29: Default sort state is 'name_asc' (alphabetical A-Z)
✅ Lines 112-124: Identical sorting logic as MedicalEquipmentPage
✅ Lines 217-241: Sort bar UI with 4 pill buttons
✅ Line 232: Active sort pill uses bg-green-500 (green accent for personal care)
✅ Sort works with subcategory filter and search
✅ Line 65: GET /api/products returns products sorted by name (alphabetical)
✅ Products include selling_price and discount_percent fields for frontend sorting

medical_equipment_products.name: Dr. Morepen Blood Glucose Monitor BG-03

expected_sort_orders.A-Z: Digital Thermometer → Dr. Morepen → Omron → Pulse Oximeter → VICTORY

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review passed - Google OAuth required for E2E UI testing)

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for authenticated testing

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product sorting feature fully implemented. Backend returns products with sorting fields. Frontend sorting is client-side using useMemo. Default sort is alphabetical (A-Z). Four sort options available: A-Z, Price Low-High, Price High-Low, Discount (highest first). Medical Equipment page uses orange accent, Personal Care uses green. Manual testing: Login via Google OAuth, navigate to /medical-equipment or /personal-care, click sort pills to change order, verify products reorder correctly.
